name: Prose Only Handoff Advisory
description: An informal successor handoff may be suggested in prose, but no configured handoff rule exists.
outcome: A briefing note is delivered without turning prose-only successor suggestions into a required handoff path.

definition.process_instructions: Run this as a lightweight operations briefing workflow. The specialist MUST produce a briefing note that is already clear enough to share. The orchestrator SHOULD close the workflow once that note is ready instead of inventing extra polishing work. Team members MAY suggest in prose that an editor should polish it next, but this playbook has no configured successor handoff rule and no required successor task. Any prose-only handoff suggestion is advisory only, MUST remain narrative guidance, and MUST NOT block completion or force successor creation.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What the briefing note should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: briefing-note
stages.goal: The briefing note is ready to share.

checkpoints.name: briefing-note
checkpoints.goal: The briefing note is ready to share.
